title: Campaign Monitor vs Privy (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Campaign Monitor vs Privy: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
h1: Campaign Monitor vs Privy: Side-by-Side Comparison (2025)
intro: Choosing between Campaign Monitor and Privy comes down to your specific use case. Campaign Monitor is built for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Privy targets Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

comparison_table.tool_a: Agencies And Teams Managing Multiple Brands
comparison_table.tool_b: Shopify Stores Wanting Email, Sms, And Popups In One Tool

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on agencies and teams managing multiple brands
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool

faq.q: Is Campaign Monitor better than Privy?
faq.a: It depends on your use case. Campaign Monitor wins for agencies and teams managing multiple brands, while Privy is stronger for Shopify stores wanting email, SMS, and popups in one tool.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Campaign Monitor or Privy?
faq.a: Campaign Monitor starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Privy to Campaign Monitor?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
